'''竏喘-ch-n-k''' ('''kabachnekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flemish|flemish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flemish|flemish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喘-ch-n-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabachnekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachnekoko|thibachnekoko]] || [[word:jibachnekoko|jibachnekoko]] || [[word:shibachnekoko|shibachnekoko]] || [[word:kibachnekoko|kibachnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachnekoko|thuthubachnekoko]] || [[word:jujubachnekoko|jujubachnekoko]] || [[word:shushubachnekoko|shushubachnekoko]] || [[word:kukubachnekoko|kukubachnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubachnekoko|thubachnekoko]] || [[word:jubachnekoko|jubachnekoko]] || [[word:shubachnekoko|shubachnekoko]] || [[word:kubachnekoko|kubachnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubachnekoko|thubachnekoko]] || [[word:jubachnekoko|jubachnekoko]] || [[word:shubachnekoko|shubachnekoko]] || [[word:kubachnekoko|kubachnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebachnekoko|thebachnekoko]] || [[word:jebachnekoko|jebachnekoko]] || [[word:shebachnekoko|shebachnekoko]] || [[word:kebachnekoko|kebachnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobachnekoko|thothobachnekoko]] || [[word:jojobachnekoko|jojobachnekoko]] || [[word:shoshobachnekoko|shoshobachnekoko]] || [[word:kokobachnekoko|kokobachnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobachnekoko|thobachnekoko]] || [[word:jobachnekoko|jobachnekoko]] || [[word:shobachnekoko|shobachnekoko]] || [[word:kobachnekoko|kobachnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobachnekoko|thobachnekoko]] || [[word:jobachnekoko|jobachnekoko]] || [[word:shobachnekoko|shobachnekoko]] || [[word:kobachnekoko|kobachnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦbachnekoko|thﾃｦbachnekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦbachnekoko|jﾃｦbachnekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦbachnekoko|shﾃｦbachnekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦbachnekoko|kﾃｦbachnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabachnekoko|thathabachnekoko]] || [[word:jajabachnekoko|jajabachnekoko]] || [[word:shashabachnekoko|shashabachnekoko]] || [[word:kakabachnekoko|kakabachnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabachnekoko|thabachnekoko]] || [[word:jabachnekoko|jabachnekoko]] || [[word:shabachnekoko|shabachnekoko]] || [[word:kabachnekoko|kabachnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabachnekoko|thabachnekoko]] || [[word:jabachnekoko|jabachnekoko]] || [[word:shabachnekoko|shabachnekoko]] || [[word:kabachnekoko|kabachnekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
